sections.paragraph:
ὄρνιξ (so as nom., Athen. 9, 374d; Herodian Gramm. I p. 44, 7 L.; PCairZen 375, 1. The dat. pl., ὄρνιξι also PLond I, 131 recto, 125 p. 173; 202 p. 175 al. [78/79 a.d.]; s. Mayser 531.—On this Doric form s. Kühner-Bl. I 510; Thumb 90f; APF 4, 1908, 490; Crönert 174, 5; FRobert, Les noms des Oiseaux en grec ancien, diss. Basel 1911, 17; B-D-F §47, 4; DELG s.v. ὄρνις) Lk 13:34 v.l. for the Att. ὄρνις, q.v. W-S. §9, 10; Mlt-H. 130f; 133.—M-M.

Athen Athen , III a.d.—List 5

Herodian Gramm Herodian Gramm , II a.d.—List 5

  1. L. = KLachmann, editor of the Greek NT (1842–50)—List 1, beg.

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

dat. dat. = dative

  1. pl. = plural

PLond PLond = PLondon=Greek Papyri in the British Museum—List 4

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Mayser Mayser = EM., Grammatik der griechischen Papyri aus der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

Thumb Thumb = ATh., Die griechische Sprache im Zeitalter des Hellenismus—List 6

APF APF = Archiv für Papyrusforschung—Lists 4, 6

diss. diss. = dissertation

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Att. Att. = Attic, esp. in ref. to dialect

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

W-S. W-S. = GWiner, Grammatik des neutestamentlichen Sprachidioms, ed. PSchmiedel—List 6

Mlt-H. Mlt-H. = JMoulton/WHoward, A Grammar of NT Greek II: Accidence and Word-formation—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 724
